com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage

Class MassStorageInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.MassStorageInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    public class MassStorageInfo
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor
    Provides available storage details from a printer.
    Since:
    API 2

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  MassStorageInfo.Protocol
      Supported Protocol for accessing to mass storage
      static class  MassStorageInfo.StorageType
      Supported type of storage

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getExternalFileDirectory()
      Returns storage directory
      long getFreeSpace()
      Returns unoccupied space on the storage
      java.lang.String getName()
      Returns mass storage name
      MassStorageInfo.Protocol getProtocol()
      Returns protocol to access files from getExternalFileDirectory()
      long getTotalSpace()
      Returns the size of storage
      MassStorageInfo.StorageType getType()
      Returns mass storage type
      java.lang.String getVolumeName()
      Returns volumeName of usb storage type
      boolean isMounted()
      Returns whether the mass storage mounted successfully or not

    • Method Detail

      • getType

        public MassStorageInfo.StorageType getType()
        Returns mass storage type
        Returns:
        StorageType supported type of mass storage
        Since:
        API 2

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Returns mass storage name
        Returns:
        String identifier to access the target mass storage, usually it's matched with path.
        Since:
        API 2

      • getTotalSpace

        public long getTotalSpace()
        Returns the size of storage
        Returns:
        long size of storage
        Since:
        API 2

      • getFreeSpace

        public long getFreeSpace()
        Returns unoccupied space on the storage
        Returns:
        long unoccupied space of storage
        Since:
        API 2

      • isMounted

        public boolean isMounted()
        Returns whether the mass storage mounted successfully or not
        Returns:
        boolean True if massstorage is mounted and ready to use
        Since:
        API 2

      • getExternalFileDirectory

        public java.lang.String getExternalFileDirectory()
        Returns storage directory
        Returns:
        String externalFileDirectory path
        Since:
        API 2

      • getProtocol

        public MassStorageInfo.Protocol getProtocol()
        Returns protocol to access files from getExternalFileDirectory()
        Returns:
        Protocol protocol
        Since:
        API 2

      • getVolumeName

        public java.lang.String getVolumeName()

        Returns volumeName of usb storage type

        Returns:
        String volumeName
        Since:
        API 3
